## Portfolios
- [Catering Services Website](https://techfusiongear.com/portfolio/catering-services-website/)
  TechFusionGear built a WordPress catering website with online menu, event booking, catering packages, photo gallery, online ordering & WhatsApp integration.
- [Divine Immigration Consultants Services Website](https://techfusiongear.com/portfolio/divine-immigration-consultants-services-website/)
  TechFusionGear built Divine Immigration Consultants – a WordPress website for Australian visa & migration services with 20+ visa categories and lead generation.
- [Education &amp; Migration Consulting Website](https://techfusiongear.com/portfolio/education-migration-consulting-website/)
  TechFusionGear built a WordPress education & migration consulting website with student visa services, PR pathways, skills assessment, team profiles & blog.
- [Ez Chemist – Online Pharmacy &amp; Healthcare Store Website](https://techfusiongear.com/portfolio/ez-chemist-online-pharmacy-healthcare-store-website/)
  TechFusionGear developed Ez Chemist – a Laravel-based online pharmacy website with product catalog, licensed pharmacy integration & healthcare blog features.
- [Food Ordering Website for a QSR Brand](https://techfusiongear.com/portfolio/food-ordering-website-for-a-qsr-brand/)
  TechFusionGear built a Laravel pizza ordering website with custom POS system, online menu, delivery/pickup options & real-time order management for restaurants.
- [HireAndTech – Tech Recruitment &amp; Career Platform Website](https://techfusiongear.com/portfolio/hireandtech-tech-recruitment-career-platform-website/)
  TechFusionGear developed HireAndTech – a Laravel-powered tech recruitment platform with ATS, resume parsing & job matching for US tech professionals.
- [Nanak Accountants – Accounting Firm Website](https://techfusiongear.com/portfolio/nanak-accountants-accounting-firm-website/)
  TechFusionGear developed Nanak Accountants – a WordPress website for Australian tax accounting firm with service pages, multi-location SEO & inquiry forms.
- [North Bond Cleaning – Professional Cleaning Services Website](https://techfusiongear.com/portfolio/north-bond-cleaning-professional-cleaning-services-website/)
  TechFusionGear developed North Bond Cleaning – a WordPress website for Australian cleaning services featuring bond cleaning, carpet cleaning & online booking.
- [Tandoori Junction – Indian Restaurant Website](https://techfusiongear.com/portfolio/tandoori-junction-indian-restaurant-website/)
  TechFusionGear developed Tandoori Junction – a WordPress + WooCommerce website for an Australian Indian restaurant with online ordering & WhatsApp integration.
- [Vectorlook – Brandtech Agency Website](https://techfusiongear.com/portfolio/vectorlook-brandtech-agency-website/)
  TechFusionGear built Vectorlook – a WordPress branding agency website featuring brand storytelling, portfolio showcase, service pages, UI/UX case studies & blog.
- [Voxmind AI – AI Product Website](https://techfusiongear.com/portfolio/voxmind-ai-ai-product-website/)
  See how TechFusionGear built a WordPress website for Voxmind AI – a UK voice biometrics company with product showcase, solutions pages & modern UI/UX design.
